message:
fix(providers): OpenAI compat config Authorization header override

Adds authorization_override() helper that checks StreamOptions headers
then compat custom_headers for an Authorization value, replacing the
previous has_authorization_header boolean check. This allows compat
configs to provide Authorization headers that correctly bypass the
default api_key-based auth.

Also adds first_header_value_case_insensitive() for case-insensitive
header lookup across HashMap<String, String> collections.

Test: compat_authorization_header_is_used_without_api_key verifies that
a compat config Authorization header is sent in the request even when
no api_key is provided via StreamOptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
